text.message: Yea I really togight you took 8410 there
maybe we can be trading buddies with blue, I hope he is reasonable at trading
completely reasonable cuz you ruined my expansions and my game, and you have no wheat at all
you are throwing the game trading with green instead of me, blue
U genuinely could not be more unreasonable
I’m not even that far ahead XD
trade with last place, not with first place
Stop asking for these trades dude 😂😂😂😂
look at the board, I am trying to balance the game
The game is balanced except for you
And u won’t get ahead by asking for a 4:1
A reasonable trade is a trade that someone will do
exactly my point, we all need to balance the game by trading
If no one is accepting ur trades it’s cause they r unreasonable by definition
Red surely is rage baiting XD
no dude, I am all about balance
blue killed my game man, he can expand and have roads, you are focusing on last place instead of blue?
ok man I am just trying to balance the game
look at you all, I am last place, not giving you 2:1
on the contrary, you should give me 2:1 to try to balance this
Has to be rage bait surely
Please explain to me about balance
If you care about balance trade oj
part of the problem is that green has been blocking orange and red instead of blue
I have no other blocks dude
I could self block the 10? But that doesn’t seem worth to me
Red you need to take road
yeah thats the reason I am saying you are losing your time blocking orange and red since the game started
It’ll be fine once you take road XD
I can even trade if you jeed
Your table talk is really bad man
Unironically the worst I’ve ever seen
seriously think I am table talking?
